extortion.description: [AI generated] "Calexis.com" is an integrated marketing and Web development firm based in Toronto, Canada. They work on a variety of client projects involving website design, development, search engine optimization, and e-commerce. Their expertise also extends to traditional marketing such as direct mail, radio, and TV. Their interdisciplinary team is dedicated to creating unique and effective digital experiences for their clients. The company emphasizes innovation, agility, and strategic thinking in their solutions.
